texto: Take back your power! I wish you the wisdom to realize that the problem isn’t that they keep lying to you
autor: it’s that you keep believing them.

I wish you the wisdom to realize that the problem isn’t that they keep lyin…” articula reflexao, steve-maraboli, power em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
